full_text:
Du Yi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Yi. Advisor for Zhuge Liang’s first Northern Campaign. Du Yi may not have existed in history. Du Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
